description_for_human: Find Nurse Practitioner and APRN jobs across all 50 US states with salary transparency.
description_for_model: NP Hiring is the #1 specialized job board for Nurse Practitioners and APRNs. Coverage includes all NP specialties (Family/FNP, Adult-Gerontology/AGNP, Pediatric/PNP, Neonatal/NNP, Women's Health/WHNP, Acute Care/ACNP, Psychiatric Mental Health/PMHNP), plus CRNAs and Certified Nurse Midwives. Use this to search NP jobs by location, setting (remote, telehealth, inpatient, outpatient, hospital, private practice, community health, VA, correctional, urgent care, home health), specialty (family, adult-gerontology, pediatric, women's health, acute care, emergency, oncology, cardiology, psychiatric, etc.), job type (full-time, part-time, contract, per-diem, locum-tenens, 1099), and experience level (new-grad, entry-level, mid-career, senior). The site covers 4,135 US cities with local salary data and cost-of-living adjustments. NP salary range $95K–$300K+ depending on specialty; CRNAs $200K–$400K. Job listings sourced directly from employer applicant tracking systems (Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, SmartRecruiters, Ashby, BambooHR, JazzHR, Workable) — no aggregator scrapes.
